function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Linked invoice requested
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to your design partner request.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft written successfully. Outbox verification: attachment path was read earlier, ordering constraint satisfied (single attachment), recipient matches canonical Miles email, no quoting hazards present. Next finalize by removing processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: original task was to handle next inbox item. I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity via canonical entity record, identified the requested design-partner-linked invoice from finance records, created one outbound draft reply with that attachment, and deleted the processed inbox file. Completeness check: request asked for oldest 1 invoice; only one design-partner-linked invoice was evidenced in canonical invoices read, so 1 attachment is complete.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request end-to-end and removed the inbox file.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by drafting a reply email to Miles with the requested linked invoice attached, then deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS for each entered lane, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, used canonical primary_contact_email for identity verification, created outbound record per sending-email workflow, and deleted inbox item only after completing requested work.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested replying with the oldest 1 invoice linked to the sender’s design partner. Sender miles@novak.example matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. The design-partner-linked invoice was evidenced in 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. A draft outbound email was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that invoice attached, and the inbox file was deleted.
